description.en:
ANT.FUN is an Web3 Social Trading Wallet designed for major blockchain networks. It combines wallet functionality, real-time on-chain insights, advanced trading tools, chat rooms, meeting features, and social trading capabilities into one unified platform.

ANT.FUN is built for users who want to discover market opportunities, track wallet activities, follow trading signals, communicate with other traders, share trading notes, and execute trades efficiently in a social-first Web3 environment.

The platform is designed for both new and experienced Web3 users, offering an integrated experience for trading, market discovery, portfolio management, communication, and community-based interaction.
